questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.answer: The Commission shall consist of 11 members total. Seven members are appointed by the Board of Trustees and serve at the pleasure of the Board. The remaining members are ex officio members as provided in the statute. No information is provided regarding how many seats are currently filled or how many vacancies currently exist. (§ 14-2)
questions.gap: The statute specifies 11 total authorized seats and the appointment structure, but does not provide current membership count or existing vacancies. A fully aligned source would include real-time data on filled seats and open vacancies.
